mapper.sql: id AS log_id, application_id, agent_name, task_name, input_summary, output_summary, status, duration_ms, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_task_log (application_id, agent_name, task_name, input_summary, output_summary, status, duration_ms, error_message, started_at, finished_at, created_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{agentName}, #{taskName}, #{inputSummary}, #{outputSummary}, #{status}, #{durationMs}, #{errorMessage}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM agent_task_log WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} ORDER BY created_at, id
